description_long: This bird features a sleek, elongated body with a long, straight tail and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage is predominantly black on the upperparts, with striking white spots and patches along the wings and back, and a warm, rusty-orange coloration on the flanks and underparts. The beak is short, conical, and pale, well-suited for seed eating. The eyes are dark and prominent, set against the black head. The legs are not clearly visible but are likely dark in color, matching the overall somber tones of the bird. The tail is long and straight, with a subtle taper, contributing to the bird's streamlined appearance.
description: A sleek black bird with white spots, orange flanks, and a long, straight tail. It has a conical beak and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's black upperparts, white wing spots, orange flanks, and long tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight, narrow tail and the white markings on the back and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same color pattern: black, white, and orange, with the beak and eye visible.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded head, conical beak, and the symmetry of the white spots on the wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: black upperparts with white spots and patches on wings and back, orange flanks, and white belly
